description: Letter to a sister named Sitt Suʿūd, in Fustat. The scribe is Elʿazar b. Ahuv and the address states that the letter should be delivered to Yefet b. Shemuʾel. Conveying congratulations, it seems on the birth of a daughter to the addressee. Others send their congratulations, including Umm Abū l-Faḍl, Abū l-Majd, Abū Manṣūr, Abū l-Fakhr, and Umm Hiba. Mentions a messenger Abū l-Faraj b. אלוש(?). Mentions having paid the price of the blanket (l. 27). Might be related to L-G Misc. 68 (PGPID 35021), which mentions a blanket for Sitt Suʿūd (an uncommon name). (Information in part from Goitein's index card.) VMR
description_he: מכתב לאחות בשם סת סעוד בפוסטאט, בכתב אלעזר בן אהוב, לברכה לרגל לידת בת. שולחים ברכות: אם אבו אל-פד'ל, אבו אל-מגד, אבו מנצור, אבו אל-פח'ר ואם הבה.
